item.title: What Happens to Your Brokerage Account When You Die — And Why Many People Haven’t Set It Up Right
item.description: The process can get complicated if you don't identify a beneficiary.

item.description: The first step is choosing an exchange.

item.description: The IRS sends out notices to taxpayers who owe money.

item.description: The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad" recommends focusing on cash flow.

item.title: The Anxiety Many Savers Have — and How to Lower It
item.description: The bucket approach to retirement saving can help.
